medical_history.chief_complaint: L femoral neck, L ankle fx
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: s/p fall from 20 foot ladder. Patient was at work, cleaning leaves from gutter, ladder gave out under him. Landed on top of ladder on L side. No head strike, LOC. Only c/o pain in L hip and L ankle. No numbness/weakness, headache, neck/back pain. Having some mild posterior left pain over ribs. No SOB. Arrived from scene. GCS 15 on ED arrival. CT head/c-spine/torso done. Also with L1, L2 vertebral body fx and several L sided rib fx and tiny apical pneumothorax.

physical_examination.general_examination: On admission: Vitals: 97.4 64 148/100 18 98RA. Back: no spinal midline TTP. No step-offs. Mild L posterior mid-chest TTP over ribs.
physical_examination.specialty_examination: Right upper extremity: Skin intact, Soft, non-tender arm and forearm, Full, painless AROM/PROM of shoulder, elbow, wrist, and digits +EPL/FPL/DIO (index) fire +SILT axillary/radial/median/ulnar nerve distributions +Radial pulse. Left upper extremity: Skin intact, Soft, non-tender arm and forearm, Full, painless AROM/PROM of shoulder, elbow, wrist, and digits +EPL/FPL/DIO (index) fire +SILT axillary/radial/median/ulnar nerve distributions +Radial pulse. Right lower extremity: Skin intact, Soft, non-tender thigh and leg, Full, painless AROM/PROM of hip, knee, and ankle, pulses, foot warm and well-perfused. Left lower extremity: Skin intact, Diffuse TTP over L hip with limited AROM/PROM pain. Large amount of swelling with obvious deformity of L ankle. Soft, non-tender thigh/leg. Full, painless AROM/PROM knee.
